footer.description: Boutique accommodation in the heart of Cusco. Where elegance meets Andean tradition.

hero.title: Rest with Andean Energy in San Blas, Cusco
hero.description: Your home in the heart of Cusco's most authentic artisan neighborhood. Modern comfort, Andean spirit, and personalized service.

about.title: Hostal Koriqallpa
about.subtitle: Rest with Andean energy
about.description: Born from a love of Cusco and its people. Inspired by the traditions of the Sacred Valley and ancestral art, we created a space where every detail matters. Your well-being is our priority in the picturesque San Blas neighborhood.
about.quote: San Blas is known as the neighborhood of artisans and creativity — the perfect place for your Cusco adventure to begin with positive, authentic energy.
about.value2: Sustainability and respect for Andean culture
about.value3: Excellence in every detail of your stay

rooms.title: Dream Spaces
rooms.subtitle: Our Rooms
rooms.description: Andean Double, San Blas Triple, or Cusco View Suite — each space designed for your comfort.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for a great stay
services.description: Traditional Andean breakfast, tourist advice, guided tours, Cusco art experiences, and 24-hour personalized assistance.
